text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 137 

LINE_MDCR_DDCTBL_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Line Medicare Deductible Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by Medicaid/CHIP or the managed care plan on this claim at the claim line level 
toward the beneficiary’s Medicare deductible. 

SHORT NAME: LINE_MDCR_DDCTBL_PD_AMT 

LONG NAME: LINE_MDCR_DDCTBL_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line
